calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award; Appendix Of Federal And Aout Of State Authorities
Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, NA'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.
Appearances: Angela Real (650.342.3416) respondent and opposing party appearing in propria persona; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: grant petition to confirm. Fees and costs to be determined on compliance with CRC 3.1700 and 3.1702. Petitioner to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
